creator: vangyzen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Conrad:  Would you ask the person with the Tahi rig if they would be willing to test this patch on a vanilla FreeBSD-CURRENT system?

Ted:  If you're still interested, would you be willing and able to run the Tahi Neighbor Discovery tests on FreeBSD-CURRENT with this patch?

Bjoern:  The patches are almost three years old, so there's no great rush.  ;-)  I'll gladly wait a few more days for your feedback.
